growth_records.strain: Enrichment R4 (low-frequency, 4 oxic/anoxic cycles per day)
growth_records.medium: Defined mineral medium with VFA mixture (separate N- and C-media)

up.method: calculated: feed=0.94 C-mmol/h (fully consumed under C-limitation, VFAs below detection in effluent); /2 C per acetate =0.47 mmol/h; biomass=1.8 g/L*0.75 L=1.35 gDW; 0.47/1.35=0.348
calculated: feed=1.00 C-mmol/h /3 C =0.333 mmol/h; /1.35 gDW=0.247
calculated: feed=0.75 C-mmol/h /4 C =0.1875 mmol/h; /1.35 gDW=0.139
calculated: qNO3 = Y_NO3/S * qS_C = 0.30 Nmol/Cmol * 2.69 C-mmol/h = 0.807 N-mmol/h; /1.35 gDW=0.598 (total C fed=0.94+1.00+0.75=2.69 C-mmol/h)
calculated (overall, cycle-averaged): Y_O2/S=0.29 mol/Cmol *2.69 C-mmol/h=0.780 mmol/h; /1.35 gDW=0.578

sec.method: calculated: Y_CO2/S=0.53 Cmol/Cmol *2.69 C-mmol/h=1.426 C-mmol/h; /1.35 gDW=1.056
reported: oxic-phase avg 0.057±0.037 N-mmol/h (anoxic 0.037±0.039); consistent with Y_N2O/NO3 0.07*0.807=0.056
calculated: overall N2O = Y_N2O/NO3 0.07 Nmol/Nmol * NO3 consumed 0.807 N-mmol/h = 0.0565 N-mmol/h; /1.35 gDW=0.042
reported: NO2- accumulation 4±6% of consumed NO3-; NO accumulation absent

growth_records.cite: Roothans et al. Aerobic denitrification as an N2O source from microbial communities. The ISME Journal (2024). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wrae116. [PMC11272060]
growth_records.snippet: the reactors were run for 76 days ... with a dilution rate of 0.02 h−1 ... R4 ... Y N2O/NO3- 0.07±0.04, Y X/S 0.44±0.04, Y NO3-/S 0.30±0.04, Y O2/S 0.29±0.03, Y CO2/S 0.53±0.03 ... oxic 0.057±0.037 vs anoxic 0.037±0.039 N-mmol/h
growth_records.notes: Mixed prokaryotic ENRICHMENT community, not a single strain; specific rates are community-level (limited for single-organism GEM constraint). Chemostat steady state so mu=D=0.02/h (reported); doubling time=ln2/0.02=34.7 h. Biomass estimated by authors at 1.8±0.2 g/L from NH4+ assimilation (0.2 N-mol/C-mol) and cross-validated by C-balance; working volume 0.75 L => 1.35 gDW. VFA feed rates (acetate 0.94, propionate 1.00, butyrate 0.75 C-mmol/h) equal consumption because VFAs were below detection in effluent under C-limitation. Substrate consumed in C-mmol converted to mmol by dividing by carbon number (acetate/2, propionate/3, butyrate/4). Product/acceptor rates derived from reported overall stoichiometric yields (Table 1) times total organic C uptake 2.69 C-mmol/h, then divided by 1.35 gDW. All arithmetic shown in each rate's method field.

growth_records.strain: Enrichment R32 (high-frequency, 32 oxic/anoxic cycles per day)
growth_records.medium: Defined mineral medium with VFA mixture (separate N- and C-media)

up.method: calculated: feed 0.94 C-mmol/h /2 =0.47 mmol/h; biomass=2.1 g/L*0.75 L=1.575 gDW; 0.47/1.575=0.298
calculated: Y_NO3/S=0.20 Nmol/Cmol *2.69 C-mmol/h=0.538 N-mmol/h; /1.575 gDW=0.342

sec.method: reported: oxic 0.042±0.029 vs anoxic 0.038±0.019 N-mmol/h; consistent with Y_N2O/NO3 0.07*0.538=0.038
calculated: overall N2O=0.07 Nmol/Nmol *0.538 N-mmol/h=0.0377 N-mmol/h; /1.575 gDW=0.024
reported: NO2- accumulation 2±3% of consumed NO3-; NO absent

growth_records.cite: Roothans et al. Aerobic denitrification as an N2O source from microbial communities. The ISME Journal (2024). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wrae116. [PMC11272060]
growth_records.notes: Mixed prokaryotic ENRICHMENT community (not single strain). mu=D=0.02/h (chemostat steady state, reported); doubling time=ln2/0.02=34.7 h. Biomass 2.1±0.3 g/L * 0.75 L =1.575 gDW. VFA feed = consumption (VFAs below detection, C-limited). C-mmol->mmol via carbon number. Acceptor/product rates from reported Table 1 yields * total organic C uptake 2.69 C-mmol/h /1.575 gDW. All arithmetic in each rate's method field. Differs from R4 only in cycling frequency; R32 had higher O2 and lower NO3- respiration yield.
